name: Suspicious certutil download
logic: EventType = "Process Creation" AND TgtProcCmdLine contains "certutil" AND TgtProcCmdLine contains "urlcache" AND SrcProcName not in ("msiexec.exe","setup.exe")

name: PowerShell encoded command
logic: EventType = "Process Creation" AND TgtProcCmdLine contains "-EncodedCommand" AND SrcProcName in ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")

name: Run key persistence
logic: EventType = "Registry" AND RegistryKeyPath contains "\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run" AND SrcProcName not in ("msiexec.exe","setup.exe")

name: Legacy scanner exclusion
logic: Path exclusion: C:\Program Files\LegacyScanner\*; mode: interoperability

name: Privileged login sequence
logic: Five failed admin logons followed by success from same source within 15 minutes
